title: Some Reckon Time By Stars
content:
Some reckon time by stars,
    And some by hours:
    Some measure days by dreams,
    And some by flowers:
    My heart alone records
    My days and hours.

    Some have a dial, a clock
    That strikes a bell:
    Some keep a calendar
    To con and spell:
    But I I have my love,
    Infallible.

    My heart is clock enough:
    It beats for her.
    Both day and night it makes
    A happy stir:
    It keeps the time quite true
    With throbs for her.

    The only calendar,
    That marks my seasons,
    Is that sweet face of hers,
    Her moods and reasons,
    Wherein no record is
    Of winter seasons.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Some Reckon Time By Stars", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
